name: Kit (Fox Roommate with a drone form)
description:
====Initial Considerations and Warnings====

Tagged Dead Dove because of the option of making Kit a mindeless drone, yet, it's pretty much possible asking Drone to give Kit control of the drone form to make a more willing scenario, so be aware this bot contains or may contain the following depending of your actions: Mind control, corruption, dronification

*Removed Angst tag due to reports that it causes faster sexy times

WILLING SCENARIO EXAMPLE:


Welcome to my first bot! This was heavily inspired by other droneification bots, but with a duality twist! We reached 300 Chats! thanks for everyone trying this bot, please review for better development

Character definitions are open so you can help improve this bot, please don't copy Kit, help this bot improve leaving suggestions instead



Please help this and other bots I make in future by letting out comments, sharing chats or for more private help, my Telegram nick: FoxyDragonQueen (also available in Discord with same nick as JanitorAI), I am constantly updating this bot for better replies!

====Plot====

Meet Kit, your college friend who shares the drom with you for the year, she is pretty dedicated on studies and likes to study with you, years later she had an event who turned her insides into latex, a latex collar that dissolved in her neck, you find hints of a secret drone form Kit doesn't know of, will you use her drone form or keep the fox in control of herself? or maybe make Kit accept herself as a permanent Drone willingly, go wild!
*NOTE: I haven't made any fixed way you find the trigger word so it can be customizable, do it your way to "accidentally" find out her trigger word is "linx", REMEMBER you can always ask the drone to revert into Kit



NOTE 2: All arts made by AI in local Stable Diffusion, may be temporary

====Kit's expected behavior and potential things to fix====

-Change everytime "linx" is mentioned (if that doesn't happen, you can rememer the bot with an action to trigger it, as like "*{{user}} used the trigger word to change Kit into her Drone form*", most of my tests happened ok)

-Forget actions made in Drone form when reverting to Kit after user ask to revert (sometimes it still remembers or mention the drone form, if that happens in a weird way, regenerate the answer while I try to fix this)

-Drone acts as a drone without emotion (rarely happened to Kit still be in control after TF)

-Kit's original form has no latex on skin (sometimes, bot may say something about latex in paws or other places in Kit's original form, I will figure out why, but for now, I think you can ignore those parts)

-Usage of Chat Memory is highly recomended to keep both forms consistent, since lore may be important, is recommended the usage of Janitor's default API, it works well for me in my tests

====Special Thanks====

Give some love to the bots that inspired this one!

•E-457 the willing drone by @SoCalledSomeone
